meaning: n.球,球体,范围,领域,方面,圈子,半球
examples: Because the earth spins, it is not a perfect sphere.
This area was formerly within the sphere of influence of the US.
We have this massive activity sphere.
The soldier credited with turning around the war in Iraq will soon be working in a wider sphere.
First, the domestic sphere, when men went to work and women were stuck at home.
